children.text: new vehicle or engine certification under or part C,section 7525(a) of this title
new vehicle or engine compliance monitoring and testing under or part C, andsection 7525(b) of this title
in-use vehicle or engine compliance monitoring and testing under or part C.section 7541(c) of this title

children.heading: Special Treasury fund
children.label: b Special Treasury fund
children.text: Any fees collected under this section shall be deposited in a special fund in the United States Treasury for licensing and other services which thereafter shall be available for appropriation, to remain available until expended, to carry out the Agency’s activities for which the fees were collected.

children.heading: Limitation on fund use
children.label: c Limitation on fund use
children.text: Moneys in the special fund referred to in subsection (b) shall not be used until after the first fiscal year commencing after the first July 1 when fees are paid into the fund.

children.heading: Administrator’s testing authority
children.label: d Administrator’s testing authority
children.text: Nothing in this subsection shall be construed to limit the Administrator’s authority to require manufacturer or confirmatory testing as provided in this part.
